operating_state: Rental revenues increased to $7.5 billion from $6.8 billion driven by rent change on rollover of 68.7% and same-store NOI growth of 6.6%. Operating portfolio occupancy declined to 95.8% from 97.6% reflecting softening market conditions. Development activity decreased with 26 new starts versus 55 in 2023, while 72 buildings stabilized with weighted average yield of 6.2%.
cost_structure: Real Estate Segment NOI increased $572 million primarily from rent increases on lease rollovers and development completions. Rental expenses increased driven by higher insurance costs from weather-related events. General and administrative expenses rose due to inflationary increases and higher compensation costs.
material_events: Generated $4.8 billion in net proceeds and $1.3 billion in realized gains from property contributions to co-investment ventures and third-party sales. FIBRA Prologis acquired 89.9% of Terrafina through tender offers, reducing Prologis ownership to 34.6%. Established commercial paper program and issued $4.2 billion in senior notes with weighted average interest rate of 4.8%. Recognized significantly higher gains on real estate dispositions of $899 million net of taxes compared to $158 million in 2023.
macro_exposures: Exposed to foreign currency exchange risk across global investments with unrealized losses of $68 million compared to gains of $18 million in the prior year. Interest expense increased to $864 million from $641 million due to higher rates on new debt issuances. Operating in softening global logistics markets with recent quarters showing lower or negative market rental growth despite continued positive lease mark-to-market.
forward_outlook: Management expects development activity to increase as market conditions warrant and anticipates renewed customer leasing activity entering 2025. Positioned for organic revenue growth through considerable upside potential in existing leases to capture cumulative market rent growth. Development portfolio expected completion before July 2027, currently 31.9% leased.
uncertainty_profile: Maintaining compliance with financial debt covenants including debt service coverage and leverage ratios. Co-investment ventures carry non-recourse third-party debt requiring refinancing management. Deferred income tax positions remain subject to future settlement timing with foreign currency-denominated net asset settlements indefinite as to timing.
